exploration_notes: Implementation adds `scrollend` DOM event support to Servo via frame-based debouncing. Two new fields on `Document` track scrollend state: `scrollend_next_frame_targets` (targets scrolled this frame) and `pending_scrollend_event_targets` (targets to fire scrollend for). When a scroll event is queued in `handle_viewport_scroll_event` or `handle_element_scroll_event`, the target is added to next-frame targets and removed from any pending scrollend (canceling premature fire).
